base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_bosses — a character (boss) from 1994 super metroid. Enemies across 6 regions + bosses (Kraid/Phantoon/Draygon/Ridley. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Enemies across 6 regions + bosses (Kraid/Phantoon/Draygon/Ridley → Golden Torizo sub-bosses → Mother Brain final)
